geopolitics.title: Iceland to hold referendum on resuming EU membership bid
geopolitics.description: Iceland's government has said a vote on resuming accession talks with the EU will be held in August. Iceland withdrew from talks in 2013 — but rising costs, the war in Ukraine and US imperialism have prompted a rethink.
